name: lossless-openclaw-orchestrator
description: Index, search, and control local Codex sessions through OpenClaw with approval-gated safety; Claude Code remains an experimental adapter stub.

scripts.build: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/packages/openclaw-plugin/src/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/packages/openclaw-plugin/src/index.js
